flags.concern: Properties panel: BulkClipPanel still omits `ParameterControls`, so parameterized custom effects cannot actually be tuned while multi-select is active.
flags.evidence: The repository routes multi-selection to [PropertiesPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/PropertiesPanel.tsx#L121), and the bulk branch already exposes effect selectors in [BulkClipPanel.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/components/PropertiesPanel/BulkClipPanel.tsx#L246). The revised plan only writes default params in bulk mode and explicitly says not to render `ParameterControls` there, so the existing bulk properties surface still cannot edit parameter values.

flags.concern: Effect schema evolution: the plan says existing clip params will be merged when an effect schema changes, but it never assigns that merge to a real load/render/save path. In this repo, clip effect state is loaded and saved as raw JSON and the render path forwards it verbatim, so clips with stale or partial params will not automatically pick up newly added defaults.
flags.evidence: `ClipMeta` is a plain pass-through container for `entrance`/`exit`/`continuous` ([timeline-data.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts#L26)); existing clip effect objects are copied in and back out unchanged ([timeline-data.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts#L106), [timeline-data.ts](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/lib/timeline-data.ts#L243)); and `wrapWithClipEffects` just forwards the clip config to the effect component ([effects/index.tsx](/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/tools/video-editor/effects/index.tsx#L109)). The updated plan fixes default-writing at selection time, but it still does not define how already-applied clips are normalized after a schema edit.
